title: Senior Doctor - Piramal Pharma - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Piramal Pharma - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Piramal Pharma in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Piramal Pharma:
Piramal Pharma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Pharma!
